What is the Adverse Weather Days Article #?
What are the Adverse Weather Days Terms & Conditions?
gold_value: MSA 4.3.7.2 (1) extreme or unusual compared to prior 10 year weather data (2) must have actually caused subcontractor to not work (3) claim must be substantiated by weather data (4) only applicable if delay will delay substantial completion (5) claim must be submitted within 5 cal days (6) must be submitted to owner by the end of the calendar month following the month with adverse weather conditions.
